examples: Liza was so frightened she couldn't make a sound.
Liza thought I looked too young to be governor in part because I was thin.
Lovely dances followed, in which the only other servant, Liza, was sometimes allowed to join.
This is my daughter Liza, my son Charlie and Sam, and this is my wife Janna.
At the end of the show, Ferreira unexpectedly invited Liza Minnelli to go on stage.
